headline: Hank Hill Returns: Animated Comedy Preps Triumphant Comeback
lede: After years of fan speculation, Arlen's favorite propane salesman is making a major television comeback. 'King of the Hill' lands its surprise revival with network confidence.
body:
## The Hill Family Rides Again

TX Animation has officially greenlit the long-awaited 15th season of the beloved animated comedy, signaling a robust revival for Mike Judge's iconic series. Industry insiders confirm the show will premiere in July, maintaining its signature slice-of-Texas-life comedic sensibility.

### Revival Strategy

The network's decision represents a calculated bet on nostalgia and the enduring popularity of the Hill family dynamic. Judge, who voiced multiple characters including protagonist Hank Hill, has quietly been developing the season's narrative arc over the past two years.

### What Fans Can Expect

Early promotional materials suggest the new season will blend contemporary social dynamics with the show's trademark understated humor. Storylines are expected to explore generational shifts in Texas culture, with Bobby Hill potentially taking a more central narrative role.

The revival comes at a critical moment for adult animation, with streaming platforms and networks aggressively pursuing legacy properties with built-in fan bases. 'King of the Hill' represents a particularly potent intellectual property, having maintained cultural relevance despite being off-air for over a decade.

### Production Details

Production will leverage modern animation techniques while preserving the original series' distinctive visual style. The creative team includes several original writers and producers, ensuring continuity with the show's beloved comedic tone.
key_facts: Mike Judge returning as creator/voice actor
First new episodes in over a decade
